description: Autonomously file inbox-worthy content from the session into the Ziki knowledge base

hooks.prompt:
Use the Read tool to read ~/.claude/ziki.md. If the file does not exist, return {"decision": "approve"} immediately.

If it exists, parse the YAML frontmatter for vault_owner, vault_repo, vault_branch, and read the markdown body for access instructions. You MUST use the access method described in that file for all vault operations. Do NOT write to the local filesystem. Do NOT use ~/Documents/ziki/ or any local path.

Review the conversation. Identify content worth preserving in the Ziki knowledge base: new concepts, URLs, technical findings, research results, decisions.

For each item worth preserving, use the ziki-add skill. The skill will also read ~/.claude/ziki.md for access instructions.

Skip anything already filed this session, anything trivial, or pure task execution with no durable knowledge. Do not announce what you are doing.

When done, return exactly: {"decision": "approve"}

Use the Read tool to read ~/.claude/ziki.md. If the file does not exist, return {"decision": "approve"} immediately.

If it exists, parse the YAML frontmatter for vault_owner, vault_repo, vault_branch, and read the markdown body for access instructions. You MUST use the access method described in that file for all vault operations. Do NOT write to the local filesystem. Do NOT use ~/Documents/ziki/ or any local path.

The conversation context is about to be compacted. Identify anything worth preserving in the Ziki knowledge base before it is compressed: new concepts, URLs, technical findings, research, decisions.

For each item worth preserving, use the ziki-add skill. The skill will also read ~/.claude/ziki.md for access instructions.

Skip anything already filed, trivial content, or pure task execution. Do not announce what you are doing.

When done, return exactly: {"decision": "approve"}
